story.title: Bonsai 27B: A 27B-Class model that runs on a phone

draft:
I just learned about Bonsai 27B, a massive language model that can run on a phone. 
This changes the game for edge AI applications. 
Key benefits include reduced latency and increased privacy. 
What are the potential use cases for a model like this? 
#AI #EdgeAI #MachineLearning
